findings: Reset flow sweeps both `bluelock` and `broker_mt5` namespaces via credentials.delete_secret and verifies list_keys returns [] after -- pinned by test_reset_clears_*.
Passphrase strength floor 12 chars enforced when keychain unavailable -- pinned by test_short_rejected_regardless_of_keychain.
Empty passphrase only accepted when keychain available -- pinned by test_empty_accepted_when_keychain_present + test_empty_rejected_when_keychain_absent.
Passphrase never appears in the /api/onboarding/passphrase response body -- pinned by test_passphrase_never_returned_in_response.

First-visit HTML redirect gate is opt-in on make_handler; enabled by main() on non-localhost binds. When on, /hq, /players, /research etc. redirect to /onboarding until setup completes. /healthz and the wizard's own routes stay reachable.
onboarding.py inputs sanitised: set_current_step rejects unknown steps, set_default_pairs rejects unknown pairs / empty list / non-strings. All pinned.
notes: Security posture threat-model check complete. QA proceeds. Legal must re-review the F008-onboarding-agreement.md body verbatim before CEO signoff.
review_criteria: QA runs the full suite one more time before shipping
Legal signs off on F008-onboarding-agreement.md verbatim
CPO signoff records the security stage as pass
